title: Black holes
text: A black hole is a region of spacetime where gravity is so strong that not even light escapes its event horizon.

title: Sourdough bread
text: Sourdough bread is leavened by a fermented starter of wild yeast and lactobacilli rather than commercial baker's yeast.

title: Quantum entanglement
text: Quantum entanglement links two particles so that measuring one instantly constrains the other, a nonlocal correlation.

title: Gradient descent
text: Gradient descent optimizes a model by iteratively stepping its parameters in the direction of steepest loss decrease.

title: Roman empire
text: The Roman empire dominated the Mediterranean for centuries through its legions, roads, aqueducts, and codified law.

title: Photosynthesis
text: Photosynthesis lets plants convert sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide into glucose and oxygen inside chloroplasts.

title: Blockchain
text: A blockchain is an append-only ledger of cryptographically chained blocks maintained by a decentralized network like Bitcoin.

title: Volcanoes
text: A volcano forms where magma rises through the crust, erupting lava, ash, and gas at a vent on the surface.
